testcase.name: test_active_session_returns_response

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_sessions_dashboard.py:168: in test_active_session_returns_response assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_session_history_returns_200

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_sessions_dashboard.py:186: in test_session_history_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
